name: Honey-Mustard Barbecued Short Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the beef short ribs in a slow cooker.
2. In a medium bowl, combine mustard, crushed garlic, honey, salt, pepper, and bottled hickory smoke.
3. Pour the mixture over the ribs.
4. Cover and cook on LOW for 6-7 hours or until tender.
5. Refrigerate several hours or overnight.
6. Skim any solidified fat from the top of the sauce.
7. Remove the ribs; heat in a microwave or conventional oven.
8. Dissolve cornstarch in cold water.
9. Add the dissolved cornstarch mixture to the sauce.
10. Cook until hot and slightly thickened, stirring occasionally in a microwave or on a stovetop.
11. Pour the hot sauce over warm ribs.
